c2cost_assertion.description: Synthetic single trade flat→+1 at bar 1, hold bars 2-3, +1→flat at bar 4
c2cost_assertion.interpretation: Buggy slice charges 1.1000 pips (entry leg only). Fixed slice charges 2.2000 pips (entry + exit = full RT). Every trade was under-charged by exactly 1.1000 pips (= 1 exit leg × (spread 0.3 + overhead 0.8) pips).
